## Stop

Do not submit sensitive vulnerability details in a public issue.

Follow the coordinated disclosure instructions in
[SECURITY.md](https://github.com/agenticqueue/agenticqueue/blob/main/SECURITY.md).

- [ ] I have read `SECURITY.md` and will use the private reporting process there.

## Reference

If you opened this by mistake, close it and move the report to the private
channel described in `SECURITY.md`.
